mapper.sql: id, user_id, session_id, question, answer, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_conversation (user_id, session_id, question, answer) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{question}, #{answer})
mapper.select: SELECT c.session_id AS sessionId, MAX(c.user_id) AS userId, MAX(u.username) AS username, MIN(c.created_at) AS createdAt, (SELECT question FROM ai_conversation WHERE session_id = c.session_id AND user_id = c.user_id ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1) AS title, COUNT(*) AS msgCount FROM ai_conversation c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.session_id IS NOT NULL AND c.session_id != '' GROUP BY c.session_id ORDER BY createdAt DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ai_conversation WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.session_id AS sessionId, MAX(c.user_id) AS userId, MAX(u.username) AS username, MIN(c.created_at) AS createdAt, (SELECT question FROM ai_conversation WHERE session_id = c.session_id ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1) AS title, COUNT(*) AS msgCount FROM ai_conversation c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.session_id IS NOT NULL AND c.session_id != '' GROUP BY c.session_id ORDER BY createdAt DESC
SELECT FROM ai_conversation ORDER BY created_at DESC
